✦ Who We Are

URCSASS UFS
Bloemfontein

The Uniting Reformed Church Student Association in Southern Africa (URCSASS) at the University of the Free State is a vibrant community of students united in faith, worship, and service.

We gather around the Word of God, lifted in prayer, praise, and the singing of hymns. Our association nurtures spiritual growth, fellowship, and leadership among students in Bloemfontein.

The 2026 theme — Year of Poetry & Spiritual Revival — is a call to arise and shine as the light of Christ on our campus and beyond.

UFS Bloemfontein
2026 Revival Year
"Arise, shine; for your light has come!"
Isaiah 60:1 · Theme Verse 2026

Join us for a season of prayer, praise, and the ministry of hymns as we seek revival in our generation and on our campus.

✦ Programme

Revival Event
Schedule

Date
26 April 2026
Venue
Conlaures, UFS
Time
10:00 – 14:30
"Tshoha Jerusalema, o boneswe hobane Lesedi la hao le hlahile, kganya ya Jehova e o tjhabetse" — Isaiah 60:1
Sunday 26 April 2026 · Spiritual Revival & Fundraising
09:00 – 10:00 Arrival & Registration SMFA
10:00 – 10:10 MC Remarks Bro. Menyatso
10:10 – 10:30 Liturgy Bro. Sello
10:30 – 10:45 Welcoming Bro. Nguluvo
10:45 – 10:55 Sunday Collection SMFA
10:55 – 11:10 Theme Exegesis Bro. P. Mokone
11:10 – 11:30 Praise & Worship Sis. Unathi Nzabe (URCSASS NWU)
11:30 – 12:10 Revival Scriptures Bro. Tebello (VUT) & Takalani Rangolo (URCSASS UL)
12:10 – 12:20 Prayer Sis. Lekometsa
12:20 – 12:30 MC Remarks Bro. Menyatso
12:30 – 14:00 Fundraising Monghadi PholoanaComputers: Sis. Mokoena & Bro. Kutlwano
14:00 – 14:10 Announcements Sis. Dineo
14:10 – 14:25 Closure Bro. Sello
MC: Monghadi Menyatso Ushers: Proclamation & Worship Service Group
